body.title: Move non-Igor code from TheIgors/lab to agent_datacenter/lab
body.result: Canonical 4 Igor-imported claudecode files + engram_tools now in ADC. Shim __path__ extension maintains backward compat for existing imports. 4520 tests pass.
body.description:
Separate Igor-specific lab code (palace echo, design docs) from datacenter-shared code (CC workflow tools, benchmarks). TheIgors/lab currently houses both. Move claudecode/, tools/, benchmarks/, and related support code to agent_datacenter/lab; keep theigors/ (palace rules/decisions) and design_docs/ (Igor context) in TheIgors.

**Affected files:** TheIgors/lab/claudecode/*, TheIgors/lab/tools/*, TheIgors/lab/benchmarks/*, TheIgors/lab/seed/*, (create agent_datacenter/lab/claudecode/ and subdirs)
**Design rules:** migrate-not-delete, test-all-paths, git-mirror-intent
**Scope boundary:** IN: all CC-facing tools (queue, audit, session, workflow), compute utilities (benchmarks, seed scripts). OUT: Igor palace (theigors/), Igor context (design_docs/), shared DB utilities (utility_closet stays near Igor).
**Test plan:** (1) grep TheIgors/lab imports in CC code, verify all resolve to agent_datacenter; (2) pytest import discovery on CC tools from new paths; (3) Igor startup with palace pointer updates; (4) verify git mirrors: lab/ → agent_datacenter/lab/
**Pass condition:** CC tools import from agent_datacenter/lab and run without path errors; Igor starts cleanly; git status shows clean migration (no broken symlinks).
